prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Clean scandi-modern aesthetic with generous whitespace.

SCENE: a clean modern wood windowsill, soft warm-oak window-bench surface, minimalist style. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible) sits CENTERED on the windowsill. Just two intentional props nearby: a single small terracotta pot with a tiny snake-plant to the left, and a single small clear glass with a sprig of fresh mint. NOTHING ELSE.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight streaming through the tall window directly behind the jar, sheer linen curtain diffusing it softly. The jar is FRONT-LIT by the bounce from the bright window light reflecting around the room — clean even illumination on the jar's front label. A soft warm rim-light traces the jar's edges from the window behind. Specular highlight on the curved glossy black plastic.

FRAMING: clean modern editorial composition — the jar centered with intentional negative space around it on the sill, balanced minimalist arrangement. Slight 3/4 angle from a comfortable eye-level.

BACKGROUND: the bright tall window with sheer linen curtain drawn aside, a hint of green foliage visible through the window outside in soft-focus. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

STYLE: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.8 shallow depth, simple modern clean composition. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
